rules.message: Students cannot take this course if they have taken any of the following courses: MECH 211.

title: Programming for Mechanical and Industrial Engineers
prereqCoreqText: The following course must be completed previously: MATH 204 (Cegep mathematics 105).

rules.message: At least 1 of the following courses must be completed previously: MATH 204.
Students cannot take this course if they have taken any of the following courses: COEN 243, MECH 215.

title: Materials Science
prereqCoreqText: The following course must be completed previously: CHEM 205 (Cegep Chemistry 101).

rules.message: At least 1 of the following courses must be completed previously: CHEM 205.
Students cannot take this course if they have taken any of the following courses: MECH 221.

title: Manufacturing Processes
prereqCoreqText: The following course must be completed previously: MECH 313 or MIAE 313.

rules.message: At least 1 of the following courses must be completed previously: MECH 313, MIAE 313.
Students cannot take this course if they have taken any of the following courses: MECH 311.

title: Engineering Design and Manufacturing Processes Lab
prereqCoreqText: The following course must be completed previously or concurrently: MIAE 311.

rules.message: At least 1 of the following courses must be completed previously or taken concurrently: MIAE 311.
Students cannot take this course if they have taken any of the following courses: MECH 311, MIAE 311.

title: Machine Drawing and Design
prereqCoreqText: The following course must be completed previously: MECH 211 or MIAE 211.

rules.message: At least 1 of the following courses must be completed previously: MECH 211, MIAE 211.
Students cannot take this course if they have taken any of the following courses: MECH 313.

title: Product Design and Development
prereqCoreqText: The following courses must be completed previously: ENCS 282; MECH 211 or MIAE 211.

rules.message: At least 1 of the following courses must be completed previously: ENCS 282.
At least 1 of the following courses must be completed previously: MECH 211, MIAE 211.
Students cannot take this course if they have taken any of the following courses: AERO 444, INDU 440.

title: Applied Machine Learning in Mechanical, Industrial and Aerospace Engineering
prereqCoreqText: The following courses must be completed previously: ENGR 371; MIAE 215 or COEN 243.

rules.message: At least 1 of the following courses must be completed previously: ENGR 371.
At least 1 of the following courses must be completed previously: MIAE 215, COEN 243.
